name: Pumpkin Rum Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Dry whole wheat bread cubes
1 cup Cooked; mashed or canned pumpkin
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bread and nuts in the bottom of a 12 x 7 x 2 inch baking dish.
2. Stir together eggs, sweetened condensed milk, pumpkin, sugar, and spices in a bowl.
3. Gradually stir in milk. Add rum, butter or margarine, and vanilla.
4. Pour the mixture over the bread layer.
5. Place the dish in a preheated 350°F oven.
6. Fill a large baking pan with hot water to a depth of 1 inch.
7. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a knife inserted just off center comes out clean.
8. Serve with whipped cream or whipped topping. Serves 8-10.
